tasks.label: Setup OctoFit venv and install requirements
tasks.command: python3 -m venv octofit-tracker/backend/venv && source octofit-tracker/backend/venv/bin/activate && pip install -r octofit-tracker/backend/requirements.txt

tasks.label: Install React dependencies
tasks.command: npm install bootstrap --prefix octofit-tracker/frontend && npm install react-router-dom --prefix octofit-tracker/frontend

tasks.label: Copy OctoFit logo to public
tasks.command: cp docs/octofitapp-small.png octofit-tracker/frontend/public/octofitapp-small.png && cp docs/octofitapp-small.png octofit-tracker/frontend/src/octofit-logo.png && echo 'Logo copied'
